title: neoregelia pineliana
intro: Neoregelia pineliana, also known as the Brazilian Vase Bromeliad or Pinguinha, is a species of flowering plant in the family Bromeliaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Neoregelia pineliana include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Neoregelia pineliana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
